summary: Completed testing of YouTube voice extraction and custom voice upload features. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend compiles without errors and YouTube URL input UI renders correctly in actor cards. YouTube voice extraction endpoint successfully downloads audio from YouTube and saves to actor's custom_voice field.
passed_tests: POST /api/projects - create project returns 200/201 with project_id
GET /api/projects - list projects returns 200 with array
GET /api/projects/{id} - get project detail returns correct data
YouTube voice extraction returns path, title, duration, size fields
YouTube voice extraction saves custom_voice to actor
Frontend renders YouTube URL input in actor cards (data-testid='actor-yt-url-{id}')
Frontend renders YT extract button in actor cards (data-testid='actor-yt-extract-{id}')
seed_data_creation: Updated project proj_ad466688a6b2 with 2 actors and 2 segments for UI testing. YouTube voice extracted from Rick Astley video saved to SPEAKER_00.
context_for_next_testing_agent: YouTube voice extraction feature fully working. Endpoint POST /api/projects/{id}/youtube-voice accepts {url, actor_id} and returns {path, title, duration, size, actor_id}. Custom voice upload endpoint POST /api/projects/{id}/upload-actor-voice accepts multipart form with file and actor_id. Frontend has YouTube URL input and YT button in each actor card. Test session: test_session: [REDACTED].

features_verified.youtube_voice_extraction: POST /api/projects/{id}/youtube-voice - downloads audio from YouTube URL, saves to storage, assigns to actor
features_verified.youtube_response_fields: Returns path, title, duration, size, actor_id
features_verified.custom_voice_persistence: custom_voice field saved to actor in database
features_verified.upload_actor_voice: POST /api/projects/{id}/upload-actor-voice - accepts file upload and assigns to actor
features_verified.frontend_youtube_ui: YouTube URL input and YT button render in actor cards with data-testid attributes

response.title: Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up (Official Video) (4K Remaster)
